bio_html: Nadeem Akbar Najar is a mechanical engineer and public policy researcher from the Kashmir Valley, India, whose work sits at the critical intersection of engineering, policy, and economics. His research focuses on winter road maintenance—a domain that demands technical rigor, governance insight, and fiscal prudence in equal measure..
contact: Public Works (R&B) Department, Jammu and Kashmir
